'''Kirth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a member of [[Roons Sewell]]'s acting troupe. He was present at the performance where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[Masla (Human)|Masla]].

[[File:Masla_Kirth.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Roons Sewell]], [[Masla (Human)|Masla]] and Kirth.]]

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 10|''Empire'' 10]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
